attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.WIP_ENTITY_ID, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.SCHEDULED_FLAG, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.PRIMARY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.SCHEDULE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.DEMAND_CLASS, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.SCHEDULED_COMPLETION_DATE, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.LINE_ID, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.STATUS, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.DEMAND_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.DEMAND_SOURCE_DELIVERY, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES,
 (
 select WIP_ENTITY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES
 minus
 select WIP_ENTITY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.WIP_ENTITY_ID = STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.WIP_ENTITY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES)
